title: The Future of Potions?
description:
You feel a faint rumbling as you round the corner to discover a gigantic spinning apparatus!
It has several slots which appear to convert liquids into a highly compressed digestible tablet.

The idea of turning these health tonics into a tiny morsel is uncomfortable but perhaps it's good to try new things?

options.title: Trade one of your potions
options.description: Lose [gold]one of your potions[/gold]. Obtain an [gold]Upgraded[/gold] [gold]card of the same rarity and random type[/gold].

conditions: At least 2 potions in your deck
notes:
This event dynamically generates 1-3 options based on the number of potions you have (up to 3). Each potion can be traded for an [gold]Upgraded[/gold] card of matching rarity.

The card's type is randomly chosen from: [gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold], or [gold]Power[/gold]. However, if the potion is [gold]Common[/gold] or [gold]Token[/gold] rarity, [gold]Power[/gold] cards are excluded from the random selection.

During the event, you cannot remove potions from your deck.
